about.heading: About Us
about.title: Time to take action with the international Citadels Market broker
about.p1: Trading will bring you profit with proper support, constant education, and a reasonable approach. Citadels Market is a broker platform that has created all the conditions to help you improve your trading life in every possible way.
about.p2: From educational broker's tools, demo accounts, and 24/7 support to your financial success, Citadels Market works tirelessly to remain at the forefront in trading online. Join now! Take full advantage of this online trading leader and make your way into the world of professional trading.

stats.countriesDesc: We support all, so traders from all over the world could enjoy and profit anytime

trusted.title: Trusted by millions of traders
trusted.f1Desc: Fees from 0% with no hidden costs.
trusted.f2Desc: 24/7 live support with a 30-second average response time.
trusted.f3Desc: Citadels Market is authorized financial services provider and cryptocurrency exchange.

features.f1Body: The interface is built for speed — switch between markets, charts, and orders in seconds with minimal clicks. Whether you're a beginner or a pro, everything is exactly where you'd expect it to be.
features.f2Body: Analyze the market with interactive charts, technical indicators, and drawing tools — all directly in the platform. No need for third-party tools to stay ahead of the trends.
features.f3Body: Place trades instantly with one-click execution and manage them easily with advanced order types like stop-loss and limit orders. Every action is responsive and reliable.
features.f4Body: Stay in control with live price feeds and customizable alerts. Get notified of price movements or trade activity the moment it happens — no delays, no missed opportunities.
features.fundingHead: Seamless trading with secure funding options
features.fundingBody: Fund your account quickly and securely with a variety of trusted payment methods. Our platform ensures your deposits and withdrawals are processed efficiently, so you can focus on trading with confidence and peace of mind.

stockDerivatives.title: Trade Stock derivatives:
stockDerivatives.p1Head: Access a Wide Range of Instruments –
stockDerivatives.p1: Trade options, futures, and other stock derivatives across major global markets.
stockDerivatives.p2: Use derivatives to hedge, speculate, or enhance portfolio performance with strategic exposure.
stockDerivatives.p3: Make informed decisions with powerful trading tools, analytics, and up-to-the-second market data.

mirrorTrading.title: Mirror Trading
mirrorTrading.i1Desc: Copy trading is a type of trading where you copy the trades performed by another, more experienced trader. It can be manual, semi-automatic or fully automatic.
mirrorTrading.i2Desc: The trade entry and exit rules can be based on simple conditions such as a moving average crossover or they can be complicated strategies that require a comprehensive understanding of the programming language specific to the user's trading platform.
mirrorTrading.i3Desc: Trade popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and more with ease. Our platform offers secure transactions, real-time pricing, and advanced tools to help you capitalize on the dynamic crypto market — whether you're a beginner or an experienced trader.
mirrorTrading.i4Desc: Utilize advanced risk management features such as stop-loss, take-profit, and negative balance protection to help safeguard your investments and trade with greater confidence.

forex.title: Why trade Stocks with us?
forex.subtitle: All you need to become a trading guru gathered in one place: education, analytics, video lessons, trading tips, market news, and so much more!
forex.f1Body: Trade stocks from NYSE, NASDAQ, LSE and other top global exchanges — all from one account.
forex.f2Body: Amplify your stock positions with leverage up to 1:20 to maximise exposure with less capital.
forex.f3Body: Invest in high-value stocks with as little as $1, making premium equities accessible to every trader.
forex.f4Body: Order execution from 0.1 seconds for a smoother and fast trading experience.

whyCopyTrading.title: Why mirror trading?
whyCopyTrading.r1Head: Get results while others do the work
whyCopyTrading.r1Body: Spend less time analyzing markets or manually setting strategies. Sit back and watch as your portfolio replicates automatically.
whyCopyTrading.r2Body: Gain valuable insights into market trends, strategies, and risk management — all while observing real-world trading in action.
whyCopyTrading.r3Head: Trade at the same price as the top traders
whyCopyTrading.r3Body: Get the same execution price as the trader you are copying through a built-in price-matching algorithm.
whyCopyTrading.r4Body: Customize your risk exposure with individual Stop Loss and Take Profit limits for each trade.
whyCopyTrading.r5Body: Tap into the expertise of real traders and mirror their tried and tested strategies to achieve your desired results.
whyCopyTrading.r6Body: Enjoy the freedom to start, stop, or modify your copy trading settings at any time, adapting to changing market conditions.

stocksSection.title: Stocks
stocksSection.s1Desc: Swing trading is a style of trading that attempts to capture short- to medium-term gains in a stock (or any financial instrument) over a period of a few days to several weeks. Swing traders primarily use technical analysis to look for trading opportunities.
stocksSection.s2Desc: Futures contracts also exist for bonds and even bitcoin. Some traders like trading futures because they can take a substantial position (the amount invested) while putting up a relatively small amount of cash. That gives them greater potential for leverage than just owning the securities directly.
stocksSection.s3Desc: Buying stocks and holding on to them with a view to making long term gains is after all, one of the more common investment strategies. It's also a perfectly sensible way to invest, providing you have some idea about which stocks.
stocksSection.s4Desc: Trade oil and gas commodities with Citadels Market — access global energy markets with competitive spreads and powerful trading tools.

findYourself.title: Find Yourself on Citadels Market
findYourself.c1Body: Our transparent investment processes detail how each investment team identifies and implements investment opportunities and the risk/return profile to be expected. We believe that strict adherence to these guidelines is one of the most effective forms of risk management.
findYourself.c2Body: As a signatory of the United Nations-supported Principles for Responsible Investment (UN PRI) initiative, we're committed to investing responsibly and supported by a global team of dedicated ESG specialists whose recommendations help shape the investment process.
findYourself.c3Body: Portfolio risk management is supplemented by our independent risk and quantitative analytics team — which partners with investment teams to measure behavioral biases and other risks but reports to senior investment management — and an operational risk management function that assesses risk across the complex.
findYourself.c4Body: Our focus on proprietary, security-level research allows us to build high-conviction, differentiated portfolios. Our risk management processes provide valuable insight to help our teams understand potential outcomes.

tradingFingertips.p1: Clients in over 185 countries and territories trade stocks, options, futures, currencies, bonds, funds and more on 150 global markets from a single unified platform.
tradingFingertips.p2: Spot opportunities and calibrate complete portfolio performance. Keep your performance track record with PortfolioAnalyst inception reporting and historical aggregation at no cost.
tradingFingertips.p3: Our mission is to bring advanced portfolio analytics to everyone who needs them — both professionals and individuals. The best way to do that is to offer them at no cost, with no strings.

becomePro.heading: Become a Pro Trader
becomePro.title: A reliable trading platform is the foundation of success
becomePro.p1: Every trader wants to profit in the best conditions and doesn't want to fear for the safety of personal funds. The first obvious thing a novice trader does is to study different online trading sites.
becomePro.p2: The main criteria for a successful internet trading platform are international reputation, unwavering reliability, constant support at all stages, and unique useful trading features. These qualities are combined in the award-winning Citadels Market broker and electronic trading platform.

footer.v1Body: We believe in open and honest communication. All trading performance, strategies, and fees are clearly disclosed so users can make informed decisions with full confidence.
footer.v2Body: Our platform is built with robust security measures and a commitment to safeguarding our users' funds and data. We prioritize ethical practices to build long-term trust with every trader.
footer.v3Body: We simplify investing by making professional trading accessible to everyone. Through intuitive tools and expert-curated strategies, we help users grow their portfolios with ease and confidence.
footer.ctaDesc: Use our demo account and learn how to trade by using risk-free virtual funds.
footer.riskText: CFDs are complex instruments and come with a high risk of losing money rapidly due to leverage. You should consider copying a Lead Trader we provide that understand how CFDs work without the risk of losing your money. Trading derivatives is risky. It isn't suitable for everyone but only suitable for Lead Traders; you could lose substantially more than your initial investment if you don't copy trades from Lead Traders.
